---
title: "Language, Cognition and the Brain"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

Welcome to Language, Cognition and the Brain!

Here are some resources for the course:

[Getting started with plotting in R](https://ethanweed.github.io/r-tutorials/index.html)


[t-test and ANOVA conceptual introduction](scripts/ANOVA-Stroop.html)
